title: Taco Bell nutrition table (part 1) — drinks, dips, BBQ Slow Roasted Chicken line
html:
TL;DR

First of three Taco Bell nutrition pages Yahir grabbed at 4:56 a.m. on 2025-07-18 — the search-within-Taco-Bell view, dragging in: BBQ Slow Roasted Chicken Nacho Fries (510 cal), the new Cinnabon Caramel Coffee/Latte Chiller family, Crispy Chicken Burrito / Strips / Taco (BBQ + Spicy Ranch line), the full Dirty Soda with Baja Blast sizes (60–460 cal regular vs ~5 cal zero-sugar), the Dragonfruit / Mango Peach / Strawberry Passionfruit Agua Refresca + Limonada family, Dragonfruit Freeze, Dulce de Leche Cinnabon Delights (160 / 950 cal), and dip cups (Bell Sauce, Fire Ranch, Jalapeño Honey Mustard).

Why it's in the graph

Pure Brotein / BroMenu dataset-scraping work. Note the timing: 4:56:13, 4:56:23, 4:56:30 — three screenshots in 17 seconds = he scrolled and snapped, scrolled and snapped. Data-collection sprint, not curiosity. Pairs with 2025 07 18 screenshot 2025 07 18 at 4 56 23 am 02657aa9 (mid-list) and 2025 07 18 screenshot 2025 07 18 at 4 56 30 am db1a0de7 (Cantina Chicken + Tacos).

Worth flagging that Taco Bell's beverage SKU sprawl is wild — easily 30+ drink variants across sugar/zero-sugar × size — which has implications for the BroMenu menu-scan model: variants explode the matching surface area. Possibly a case for canonicalization at insert time vs storing every variant in Supabase.

What's actually on the page

  • New BBQ Slow Roasted Chicken Nacho Fries — 510 cal flagship.
  • Cinnabon Caramel Coffee/Latte Chiller — Hot 170, Iced 16/20oz 240/240, Latte Chiller 16/19oz 410/530.
  • Crispy Chicken Burrito (590 cal), Strips 2pc/4pc (230/470), Crispy Chicken Taco (270).
  • Dirty MTN Dew Baja Blast Dream Soda S/M/L 270/310/460; Zero-sugar variant 5–60 cal.
  • Agua Refresca family: Dragonfruit Berry, Mango Peach, Strawberry Passionfruit (170–210 cal).
  • Dragonfruit Freeze 16/20oz 160/200; +Dragonfruit Syrup 170/210.
  • Dulce de Leche Cinnabon Delights 2pk 160 / 12pk 950.
  • Dip cups: Bell Sauce (210), Fire Ranch (210), Jalapeño Honey Mustard (200).
  • "Last Updated: 07/17" timestamp on the source PDF — Yahir grabbed it the next morning.

Loose ends

  • Mexican Mocha Coffee/Latte and Wild Strawberry Churro Chiller continue on the next screenshot.
  • The "Dirty Soda" naming convention is novel enough that the BroMenu fuzzy matcher needs a synonym map.

  • taco bell
  • brotein / bromenu / anabolic scoring
  • supabase / restaurant menu scraping
  • fast food nutrition dataset
